summary: Crystal‑clear SBD capture with excellent balance and bass definition, though no performance details are noted.
review: The recording is an outstanding soundboard source, praised for its clarity, well‑balanced mix, and lack of noise, letting the bass notes ring out distinctly. Reviewers did not comment on the musical performance, so the show quality cannot be assessed from this feedback.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one brief but glowing review focusing on the recording’s excellent soundboard quality; no information on the musical performance, so rating reflects strong audio with limited overall data.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Clear bass, well‑balanced mix, no noise or hiss reported.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No comments on set structure or performance were provided.
